_comment: Reference example for rename_feature. Renames the Boss-Extrude1 feature to 'BasePlate'. One-way change — to revert, run a second edit with name/new_name swapped, or chain both renames in one file (smoke_roundtrip.json shows the round-trip pattern). rename_feature validates only the op shape at pre-flight; existence and collision are checked at apply time so cross-op state changes work.
